kind: mechanical conformance amendment (pre-ruling; flagged for confirmation in docs/SC-0063-BATCH-RULING-SHEET.md §E-1)

edits.why: The drafter proposed a descriptive token for the deliberately-uncoded collective ('the dead of the household'); the schema's being_id pattern ^B(\d+|\?)$ spells 'uncoded' as B?. The drafter's judgment (entity stays unbound) is preserved — only the spelling conforms. Its original note is intact in fills.json. The exegetical question (B? vs binding to B2/B4/B5) is ruling-sheet item A-4.

prompt_followup: fm-drafter-0.1.4 teaches the B? idiom so later drafts conform at source.
